title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses scaling infrastructure at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, and the future of databases. Topics include handling flash sales, infrastructure team evolution, engineering principles, and the role of AI in coding. The conversation covers why database companies succeed at regular intervals and what distinguishes top-tier engineers.
